effects.title: Triumph Stinger
effects.description: Bright rising fanfare for winning a fight.

effects.title: Bone Dice Rattle
effects.description: A rattling dice tumble with a firm final stop.

effects.title: Fallen Banner
effects.description: A dark descending sting for defeat and game over.

effects.title: Surefooted Success
effects.description: A confident upward chime for a passed skill check.

effects.title: Misstep
effects.description: A short sinking sting for a failed skill check.

effects.title: Merchant Sale
effects.description: A lower coin clink for a completed sale.

effects.title: Heroic Slash
effects.description: A sharp heroic weapon swing impact.

effects.title: Hostile Strike
effects.description: A rougher hostile hit with more weight.

effects.title: Restorative Light
effects.description: A warm magical swell for player-side healing.

effects.title: Unsettling Renewal
effects.description: A colder eerie swell for enemy healing.
